'''''Pizzazz'' 11''' is the eleventh issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[August]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.

The issue also includes the article "The Heroes," discussing science fiction movie heroes and featuring [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="Issue 11" />
